## Summary

- 

## Validation

- [ ] `cd backend && make test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual check, if relevant:

## Migration Safety

- [ ] No legacy files were deleted without an accepted replacement.
- [ ] ROS-specific logic stays behind adapter boundaries.
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests or explicitly documented.

## Accessibility

- [ ] UI changes remain keyboard reachable with visible focus.
- [ ] New controls have visible labels or accessible names.
- [ ] Color is not the only way to understand state, grouping, or warnings.
- [ ] Docs/screenshots use meaningful headings, links, and alt text where relevant.
